View.name: ORDERS_SUMMARY
View.text: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW NANGO_TEST_DB.SALES.ORDERS_SUMMARY AS SELECT c.CUSTOMER_ID, c.EMAIL, c.COMPANY, c.PLAN, COUNT(o.ORDER_ID) AS TOTAL_ORDERS, SUM(o.AMOUNT) AS TOTAL_SPEND FROM NANGO_TEST_DB.SALES.CUSTOMERS c LEFT JOIN NANGO_TEST_DB.SALES.ORDERS o ON c.CUSTOMER_ID = o.CUSTOMER_ID GROUP BY c.CUSTOMER_ID, c.EMAIL, c.COMPANY, c.PLAN
